raw_facts.fact: Subject: Hello, I am looking for a full-time female caregiver for...
Hello, I am looking for a full-time female caregiver for myself.
At least 5 times per week, 9 to 12am or 830 to 1130 would be just great.
The woman who currently works for me is willing to show you what I need done.
In addition if you need extra hours you may also work a couple of hours in the afternoon, say 4pm to 6pm.
The work is very easy, a load of cloths maybe once a week, fix me a sandwich, go to the grocery store for me, help me feed my poodle, take JJ outside for me, just help me do stuff.
Thank you and please contact me asap.

raw_facts.fact: My name is Elizabeth, and I am a recent college graduate who is now living in the northeastern Indianapolis area.
I was diagnosed with autism when I was 4.
Back in 2024, I had an opportunity to spend 4 months studying abroad in New Zealand.
I happened to get involved with a community groups geared towards young adults (ages 18-35ish) with intellectual/developmental disabilities.
There were 2 particular things that I enjoyed about this group.
The first is that it catered to a wide variety of severity levels and support needs.
The second is that the group focused on a variety of activities.
I have looked online, but as far as I am aware, there is not a similar social group that exists in or near northeast Indy.
I do plan on making a few adjustments to account for money, since the U.S. economy is unfortunately not super friendly towards those with disabilities.

new_obligations.title: Establish a social group for neurodivergent individuals
new_obligations.description: Elizabeth is seeking to establish a social group for neurodivergent individuals in the northeastern Indianapolis area.
new_obligations.source_fact: I have looked online, but as far as I am aware, there is not a similar social group that exists in or near northeast Indy.

inferences.statement: There is a high demand for a social group for neurodivergent individuals in northeastern Indianapolis.
based_on_facts: I have looked online, but as far as I am aware, there is not a similar social group that exists in or near northeast Indy.

missing_information: Details on potential participants for the group
Resources available for starting the group

proposed_actions.description: Initiate the establishment of a social group for neurodivergent individuals in northeastern Indianapolis.
proposed_actions.rationale: There is a clear need for such a group based on Elizabeth's observations.
proposed_actions.expected_outcome: Formation of a new social group that meets the needs of neurodivergent individuals.

proposed_actions.description: Investigate existing resources and support for neurodivergent individuals in the area.
proposed_actions.rationale: Understanding available resources will aid in the group's establishment.
proposed_actions.expected_outcome: A comprehensive list of resources that can support the new group.

raw_facts.fact: My name is Ava Gabriel I am currently a Junior at Westfield High School.
I am looking for summer babysitting families for occasional care and potentially frequent child care for the summer!
I’m a familiar face at Shamrock Springs Elementary, working in BAC in the afternoon and student teaching in the mornings!
My future goals and passion is to be an elementary teacher, and I am the oldest of 4 siblings.
I love being able to have the opportunity to have so much experience in something I am passionate in at my age.
-I have experience with kids from 2 years old up to middle school!
-I’ve taken my childhood development class for two years during highschool,
-I have worked in the Early Learning Center for 12 weeks in the morning as well with kids almost starting kindergarten
-I have experience with kids with autism needing ABA services
-Morning student teaching with 1st and 4th grade, planning lessons, doing small group activities, and presenting lessons and guiding through learning.
-Before and after care at Shamrock Springs helping manage over 100+ kids aged from K-4th grade.

raw_facts.fact: I let my dogs out a few minutes after 7AM this morning and the roar of heavy equipment was already disrupting my ability to enjoy my back porch.
The City's 'Clearly Audible' loud noise standard makes noise that can be clearly heard 40 feet away a violation.
Construction activity, however, is exempt from this standard.
Currently, construction activities are permitted to occur from 7AM to 10PM every day of the week.
Prolonged exposure to loud noise can lead to increased stress levels and even health issues such as sleep disturbances and hypertension.
Many cities across the country have already adopted policies that limit construction hours to more reasonable time frames, typically allowing work only from 8AM to 6PM on weekdays.
Please sign this petition so that we can show the Westfield City Council that this matter is important to our city's residents.

new_obligations.title: Sign petition regarding construction noise regulations
new_obligations.description: Residents are encouraged to sign a petition to show the Westfield City Council that the noise from construction activities is a concern.
new_obligations.source_fact: Please sign this petition so that we can show the Westfield City Council that this matter is important to our city's residents.

inferences.statement: The noise from construction activities is a significant concern for residents, indicating a potential community issue that may require action.
based_on_facts: I let my dogs out a few minutes after 7AM this morning and the roar of heavy equipment was already disrupting my ability to enjoy my back porch.
Currently, construction activities are permitted to occur from 7AM to 10PM every day of the week.
Prolonged exposure to loud noise can lead to increased stress levels and even health issues such as sleep disturbances and hypertension.

proposed_actions.description: Encourage residents to sign the petition regarding construction noise regulations.
proposed_actions.rationale: Addressing the noise issue is crucial for the well-being of residents and may lead to improved regulations.
proposed_actions.expected_outcome: Increased awareness and support for the petition among residents.

proposed_actions.description: Organize a community meeting to discuss the noise concerns and gather more support.
proposed_actions.rationale: A meeting can help consolidate community concerns and strengthen the petition's impact.
proposed_actions.expected_outcome: A unified community voice to present to the Westfield City Council.

proposed_actions.description: Reach out to local representatives to discuss the noise issue and potential regulations.
proposed_actions.rationale: Engaging with local representatives can lead to direct action on the noise concerns.
proposed_actions.expected_outcome: Increased attention from local government on the noise regulations.

raw_facts.fact: Subject: Hi neighbors, my name is Kyle Braun and I’m the...
Hi neighbors, my name is Kyle Braun and I’m the owner of KB Lawns & Beyond LLC, a local lawn care and property maintenance company.
I’m a college student that pays for their own college, so each client helps a lot, and the money goes to a good cause.
We’re currently building out our client list for the upcoming season, and spots are filling quickly.
Services include: Lawn mowing and trimming, Property cleanups, General lawn maintenance, And more as the season ramps up.
Referral bonus: If you refer a neighbor and they sign up for services, you’ll receive $10 off your first cut for each neighbor you bring in.
If you’re interested or want a free quote, feel free to comment or message me directly.
